English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Academic Personnel Office records
Cornell University. Academic Personnel Office
10-3-2531
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1980-1984. Files. Files concerning promotions of the Executive Committee and Board of Trustees. Collection material in English 2092966
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Date completed:
May 1990
EAD encoding:
Ann HubertApril 2004
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Files concerning promotions of the Executive Committee and Board of Trustees.
Cite As:
Academic Personnel Office records, #10-3-2531. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
